__prompts__.project_slug: Project name (lowercase, underscores only, e.g. lob_a_churn_prediction)
__prompts__.lob_display_name: Line of business display name (e.g. LOB A)
__prompts__.catalog_name: Unity Catalog catalog name (get this from the hub platform team)
__prompts__.schema_name: Default schema name (leave as 'default' unless instructed otherwise)
__prompts__.workspace_url: Databricks workspace URL (get this from the hub platform team)
__prompts__.spark_version: Databricks runtime version (confirm with hub platform team)
__prompts__.node_type_id: Azure VM node type (confirm with hub platform team)
__prompts__.cluster_policy_id: Cluster policy ID (get this from the hub platform team)
__prompts__.engineer_group: Entra ID group for your team (e.g. lob-a-engineers@client.com)
__prompts__.mlflow_experiment_path: MLflow experiment path (leave default unless instructed otherwise)
